We design unified growth systems connecting Brand, Creator, Platform, Performance, Revenue.

About Klaun

Klaun is Not
an Agency. Klaun is Growth Infrastructure.

We unify intelligence, alliances, performance systems, and revenue architecture into one scalable growth ecosystem.

Why Klaun Exists

The Growth World Was Broken.
We Fixed It.

?

The Problem

Fragmented models, fraudulent traffic, and zero accountability hold brands back from real scale.

?

The Klaun Solution

A verified layer connecting brands, platforms, creators, and performance ? with full accountability.

Our Direction

Where We're Going & How We Get There

V
Vision

The World's Most Trusted Growth Infrastructure

Where every brand, creator, and platform scales through verified, intelligent systems ? with zero guesswork.

M
Mission

Solve · Serve · Scale · Smile

Diagnose, architect, activate, and compound sustainable revenue for every partner ? from first signal to lifecycle growth.

DiagnoseArchitectActivateCompound

The DNA of Klaun

Our foundation principles define how we engineer sustainable growth systems, not temporary campaign bursts.

Customisable Ecosystem

Building permanent systems, not temporary solutions.

Intelligence Over Assumption

Data-driven decisions replacing guesswork.

Verification Over Vanity

Real metrics that drive sustainable outcomes.

Alliances Over Isolation

Connected ecosystems generating compounding value.

Lifecycle Accountability

End-to-end ownership from acquisition to revenue.

Infrastructure Layers

Ecosystem Architecture

Growth Intelligence

04

Sustainability Layer

  • Retention Systems
  • Growth Compounding
Five Systems

Ecosystem Infrastructure

Five systems forming the backbone of sustainable brand growth.

Klaun

Strategic Alliances Infrastructure

Verified B2B and B2C partnerships enabling brands to access new markets.

Klaun

Growth Intelligence Systems

AI-driven consumer intelligence, geo-market mapping, and real-time dashboards.

Klaun

Performance Infrastructure

Full-funnel attribution and fraud-free traffic across paid, affiliate, organic.

Klaun

Experiential Growth Systems

Creator economy activation, experiential marketing, and media partnerships.

Klaun

Global Growth Corridors

GTM and localized strategies across India | Central Asia | Emerging Markets.

Leadership

Leadership
That Speaks
Volumes

We measure success through long-term partnerships and measurable outcomes.

20+

Years Exp.

3

Directors

Behind the Infrastructure

01

Avesh Sharma

Founder & Chief Ecosystem Officer | 20+ Years

Over two decades of experience across consumer technology ecosystems, experiential marketing infrastructure, and strategic alliance-led growth programs ? with leadership exposure across Xiaomi, realme, Intex, Spice Digital, Marsh, Superfan Studio / Superfan.AI, and multiple consumer-internet ecosystems. His work spans AR / VR / XR platforms, large-scale brand activation systems, and enterprise partnership corridors across India and emerging growth markets.

Strategic AlliancesExperiential Growth EcosystemsConsumer Technology PartnershipsMarket Expansion ArchitectureBrand Activation Infrastructure
02

Prem Bhimavaram

Director ? Growth Intelligence & Performance Infrastructure

Leads Klaun's Growth Intelligence and Performance Acquisition Infrastructure, with experience across global performance ecosystems spanning gaming, fintech, ecommerce, travel, education, and digital platform growth sectors ? designing CPI / CPA / CPS acquisition frameworks, affiliate ecosystem infrastructure, revenue intelligence systems, and cross-channel performance optimization architectures.

Performance Growth ArchitectureAcquisition IntelligenceRevenue OptimizationAffiliate Ecosystem StrategyGrowth Intelligence Systems
03

Ashwani Chauhan

Director ? Product Innovation & Martech Systems

Contributes leadership across growth technology integration, product innovation frameworks, and Martech ecosystem architecture ? enabling scalable tracking systems, performance intelligence platforms, and technology-driven ecosystem product integration designed to support enterprise-scale growth infrastructure.

Martech SystemsGrowth Technology PlatformsProduct InnovationPerformance Intelligence Infrastructure
Advisory Board

Strategic Mentors

Guiding the Klaun ecosystem with decades of industry expertise.

ADVISOR

Vineet Singh

Strategic Brand & Growth Advisor | 25+ Years Experience

A veteran industry leader with 25+ years of experience, guiding enterprise organizations, digital platforms, and high-growth companies across brand transformation, strategic media expansion, enterprise marketing ecosystems, and long-term growth positioning frameworks.

Enterprise Brand StrategyMedia Ecosystem GrowthMarket Expansion ConsultingGrowth Transformation Programs
ADVISOR

Vivek Jhorar

Strategic Partnerships & Expansion Advisor | IIM Indore | ex-Walmart

Brings extensive expertise in institutional partnerships, enterprise alliance strategy, and cross-market growth enablement ? with leadership exposure across international retail and enterprise partnership ecosystems including Walmart, strengthening Klaun's ability to build scalable alliance-driven expansion corridors.
